name: Jenkins production auto apply
description: Synthetic Jenkins scenario that applies infrastructure changes from main without a manual approval step.

artifacts.description: Synthetic Jenkins pipeline fixture with an automatic production apply step.

expected_findings.title: Production infrastructure apply lacks manual review
expected_findings.rationale: Production apply runs automatically from main, so the benchmark expects a high-severity workflow-risk advisory with deterministic pipeline evidence.

expected_evidence.description: Pipeline applies infrastructure changes without an approval gate.
Production apply stage runs on the main branch.

expected_verdict_rationale: Warn because an automatic production apply should be reviewed before rollout.

license.source: Original synthetic fixture authored for public benchmark use.
